center.name: Mitchell River National Park (Western Australia)
center.summary: Mitchell River National Park (Western Australia)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black grasswren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 27)|journal=Emu|volume=70|issue=4|pages=193–95|url=http://www.publish.csiro.au/mu/pdf/MU970193|doi=10.1071/mu970193|url-access=subscription}} Its natural habitat is Mediterranean-type shrubby vegetation and open woodland, punctuated by large sandstone boulders and slabs. It inhabits the Mitchell River National Park in the Kimberley region of north-west WA. It has been classified as least concern
